/usr/lib64/ccache/c++ -fPIC -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libfawkesbaseapp.so -o /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesbaseapp.so CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/thread_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/timing_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/main_thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/daemonize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/init_options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fawkesbaseapp.dir/run.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib:/home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces -lstdc++ -lpthread /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesaspects.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkessyncpoint.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetwork_logger.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesplugin.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesconfig.so -lyaml-cpp -lsqlite3 -lelf /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkespcl_utils.so -lpcl_common /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkestf.so -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath -lBulletSoftBody -lBulletDynamics -lBulletCollision -lLinearMath /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/interfaces/libTransformInterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeswebview.so -lmicrohttpd /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesblackboard.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesinterface.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesnetcomm.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkesutils.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkeslogging.so /home/adas/fawkes-robotino/lib/libfawkescore.so /usr/lib64/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -llua-5.1 -lm -ldl -ltolua++ -lmagic -ldaemon -lpthread -lrt -ldl -luuid -L/usr/lib64 -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lcrypto -lstdc++ -lm
